title: 8" INCH ALUMINIUM OXIDE SHARPENING STONE
description: 8" inch 203mm ALUMINIUM OXIDE SHARPENING STONE A general purpose aluminium oxide combination oil stone with with a fine and medium side. Ideal for sharpening agricultural and building tools such as hoes, spades, edgers, chisels, clippers, knives and shears. Overall size: 203mm x 50mm x25mm This item is brand NEW and retail packaged!
